summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long AVGO ETF (AVGX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Broadcom Inc. (AVGO), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements AVGX was launched on Aug 21, 2024 and is issued by Defiance.
